overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a player holding a scoped weapon walking through a futuristic urban plaza toward a distinctive angular metallic building labeled 'DAESONG'. The scene features stormy overcast skies, wet reflective concrete surfaces, and modern glass skyscrapers surrounding an open plaza with a reflecting pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with reflecting pool

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet plaza holding a scoped weapon, approaching the angular Daesong building in the distance

entered.detail: large angular metallic building with faceted geometric surfaces and 'DAESONG' signage
tall modern glass and steel towers forming the city skyline
tall modern glass and steel towers forming the city skyline
rectangular water feature with steam or mist rising from the surface
wet concrete tile surface reflecting the overcast sky
young trees planted in raised concrete planters

segments.scene_description: The player walks across a vast open plaza under stormy skies, holding a scoped weapon. The angular Daesong building dominates the center horizon while modern glass skyscrapers rise in the background. A reflecting pool with mist sits to the left, and the wet pavement mirrors the gray clouds above.

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairs leading up to the Daesong building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs toward the building entrance, weapon still raised

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete stairs leading up to the building platform
low concrete walls with integrated greenery
short yellow posts lining the edge of the walkway
distinctive curved glass skyscraper with circular feature near the top

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the base of the Daesong building and begins ascending the wide concrete stairs. The building looms larger, revealing its textured metallic facade and illuminated signage. Yellow bollards and concrete planters line the approach, while the plaza falls away behind.

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the dark recessed entrance of the Daesong building
moves past the entrance and turns left to reveal the plaza and cityscape below

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance then moving past it to survey the plaza and skyline from the elevated position

entered.detail: dark recessed entranceway with illuminated interior visible through the opening

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the dark, imposing entrance of the Daesong building. After briefly facing the entrance, the player moves past it and turns to reveal a sweeping view of the plaza below and the surrounding glass skyscrapers from the elevated platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from a vast, stormy urban plaza toward the imposing entrance of a futuristic metallic building. It begins with the player traversing wet, reflective pavement under gray skies, passing a misty reflecting pool while the angular Daesong building looms on the horizon. As the player advances, the camera ascends a set of wide concrete stairs lined with yellow bollards, causing the textured metallic facade and illuminated signage of the structure to dominate the view. The scene then shifts toward the dark, imposing entrance of the building before the camera pivots away from the doorway. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a sweeping, elevated vista of the surrounding glass skyscrapers and the plaza below.
